dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend TimeGenerated = now() , OrganizationId = ['id'] , OrganizationName = ['name'] , DashboardUrl = ['url'] , Api = ['api'] , Licensing = ['licensing'] , Cloud = ['cloud'] , Management = ['management'] | project TimeGenerated , OrganizationId , OrganizationName , DashboardUrl , Api , Licensing , Cloud , Management

source | extend TimeGenerated = ts , HttpRequestMethod = ['method'] , HttpUserAgent = ['userAgent'] , SrcUserId = ['adminId'] , SrcIpAddr = ['sourceIp'] , DstHostname = ['host'] , UrlOriginal = strcat(tostring(['host']), tostring(['path'])) , EventOriginalResultDetails = ['operationId'] , EventResultDetails = tostring(['responseCode']) , EventProductVersion = case(isempty(['version']), '1', tostring(['version'])) , EventProduct = ['eventProduct'] , EventVendor = ['eventVendor'] , EventType = ['eventType'] , EventSchemaVersion = ['eventSchemaVersion'] , EventCount = toint(['eventCount']) , Dvc = ['dvc'] , EventOriginalType = ['eventOriginalType'] , SrcUserIdType = ['srcUserIdType'] , EventResult = case(toint(['responseCode']) >= 200 and toint(['responseCode']) <= 299, 'Success', 'Failure') , EventSeverity = iff(toint(['responseCode']) >= 200 and toint(['responseCode']) <= 299, 'Informational', 'Low') | project TimeGenerated , HttpRequestMethod , HttpUserAgent , SrcUserId , SrcIpAddr , DstHostname , UrlOriginal , EventOriginalResultDetails , EventResultDetails , EventProductVersion , EventProduct , EventVendor , EventType , EventSchemaVersion , EventCount , Dvc , EventOriginalType , SrcUserIdType , EventResult , EventSeverity

source | extend TimeGenerated = ts , ActorUsername = ['adminEmail'] , ActorUserId = ['adminId'] , ObjectId = ['networkId'] , OldValue = ['oldValue'] , NewValue = ['newValue'] , Object = ['networkName'] , Operation = strcat(['page'], '/', ['label']) , EventType = case(isempty(['oldValue']), 'Create', isempty(['newValue']), 'Delete', 'Set') , EventResult = ['eventResult'] , EventProduct = ['eventProduct'] , EventVendor = ['eventVendor'] , EventSeverity = ['eventSeverity'] , ActorUsernameType = ['actorUsernameType'] , ActorUserType = ['actorUserType'] , ActorUserIdType = ['actorUserIdType'] , ObjectType = ['objectType'] , EventSchemaVersion = ['eventSchemaVersion'] , EventCount = toint(['eventCount']) | project TimeGenerated , ActorUsername , ActorUserId , ObjectId , OldValue , NewValue , Object , Operation , EventType , EventResult , EventProduct , EventVendor , EventSeverity , ActorUsernameType , ActorUserType , ActorUserIdType , ObjectType , EventSchemaVersion , EventCount

source | extend TimeGenerated = ts , EventOriginalType = ['eventType'] , DvcMacAddr = ['deviceMac'] , SrcMacAddr = ['clientMac'] , SrcIpAddr = tostring(split(['srcIp'], ':')[0]) , DstIpAddr = tostring(split(['destIp'], ':')[0]) , NetworkProtocol = case(['protocol'] == 'tcp/ip', 'TCP', ['protocol'] == 'udp/ip', 'UDP', ['protocol']) , EventOriginalSeverity = ['priority'] , EventMessage = ['message'] , RuleName = ['ruleId'] , SrcHostname = ['clientName'] , ThreatName = ['signature'] , ThreatCategory = ['classification'] , EventSeverity = case(['priority'] == '0', 'High', ['priority'] == '1', 'Medium', ['priority'] == '2', 'Low', 'Informational') , EventResult = iff(['blocked'] == true, 'Failure', 'Success') , EventType = ['idsEventType'] , EventProduct = ['eventProduct'] , EventVendor = ['eventVendor'] , EventSchemaVersion = ['eventSchemaVersion'] , EventCount = toint(['eventCount']) | project TimeGenerated , EventOriginalType , DvcMacAddr , SrcMacAddr , SrcIpAddr , DstIpAddr , NetworkProtocol , EventOriginalSeverity , EventMessage , RuleName , SrcHostname , ThreatName , ThreatCategory , EventSeverity , EventResult , EventType , EventProduct , EventVendor , EventSchemaVersion , EventCount
